summary: Verify HDR Toggle Description on focus
description:
GIVEN the user's device is HDR capable
AND the user is on the settings page

steps.action: WHEN the user highlights the HDR toggle
steps.result:
THEN the user should see the following description on the left top of the screen:
Toggle on to receive the highest resolution streams, including HDR (where available), from Major League Baseball. If you experience buffering issues try toggling to off.
